note: Advisory sandbox build. DX-6 is a read-only onboarding index; its proof is a data-driven discriminator (rendered motor-row count pinned to the registry motor count) plus an empty-sink test (empty census renders UNPOPULATED, never 0/all-clear). Never a bare governance PASS.
title: State-surface index dashboard for onboarding (motors/lanes + census value-class counts)

subject.note: renders one static HTML onboarding index from the automation registry (motors + agent lanes), the Phase-2 dispatch scorecard, and the newest evidence bundle (loop census value-class counts). Sources read-only; newest evidence-*.json selected by mtime.

what_it_proves: the dashboard renders one row per registered motor (15) and per agent lane (8) read live from data/github_automation_registry_v1.json, plus the motor-lane chips

the loop census value-class counts (GUARD 5, META 22, NONE 8, REVENUE 3; loop_count 38) render as labelled cards, with the RED audit_status badged and value-class sum reconciled against declared loop_count
Lock 10: the generated HTML is written only to a local out/ path and carries a visible 'DO NOT PUSH — not for public hosting' banner
freshness: each source (registry saved_at, scorecard updated_at, evidence generated_at, census file stamp) is badged FRESH/STALE by age vs the render date; a missing stamp renders UNPOPULATED

EMPTY-SINK vs CLEAN: an empty/missing census renders an explicit UNPOPULATED card and a missing single value-class renders 'not in source', never a 0 that reads all-clear; the clean census renders numeric class cards and NOT the sink card (same renderer, opposite outcomes)

autonomy: motor autonomy fields (e.g. autonomous_promote) render LOCKED / proof-gated, never offered as ready-to-run; no autonomy or guaranteed-outcome claim; computed rollups carry a SYNTHETIC/ADVISORY watermark

RED-CAPABLE (data-driven): the rendered motor-row count is pinned to the registry count; a minimal mutation (drop one motor) renders one fewer row and fails the original-count assertion — not green-by-construction
chess_patches_applied: discriminator is a live property of the real input (rows == len(registry.motors)), verified to flip under a minimal registry mutation, not an authored strawman
empty-sink branch is exercised against a blanked census and asserted to differ from the clean render (UNPOPULATED card present iff counts absent)
renderer degrades missing files to {} so an empty sink renders UNPOPULATED instead of crashing or reading all-clear
no receipt written into any tracked receipts dir; all writes confined to catalog/builds/DX-6/ (renderer output to local out/)
verdict vocab CHECK_OK, origin=sandbox-advisory / authority=none / pass_claimed=false; never a bare governance PASS
locks_respected: Lock 5 append-only (three source JSONs + templates read-only; all writes confined to catalog/builds/DX-6)
Lock 10 deliverable (generated HTML to local out/ only, visible DO-NOT-PUSH banner, autonomy LOCKED/proof-gated, no autonomy/outcome claim, SYNTHETIC/ADVISORY watermark)
no live call (no network/CF/Supabase/sends/deploy; no Cloudflare/Railway/Vercel path)
multi-agent isolation (no read/stage of other lanes' untracked drops; no git write commands)

results.red_run_canary: FIRED (off-by-one motor-count assertion + empty-sink-reads-clean assertion both raised AssertionError as expected)
results.pollution_outside_build_dir: none (git status --porcelain tracked changes outside DX-6 == 0)

exit_gate_B4: DX-6 done — onboarding state-surface index renders motors/lanes + census value-class counts with freshness and EMPTY-vs-CLEAN (UNPOPULATED) badges, autonomy LOCKED, and a data-driven red-capable test that discriminates the real registry from a mutation.
next_action: wire the renderer to a scheduled census/evidence refresh so freshness badges track the live registry; consider a per-lane drill-down view (DX-7).
